text.title: Framework Decomposition Patterns Procedure
text.summary: Five-step procedure from "we have fat files" to "extraction proposal ready + safety net in place".

step.name: identify
step.action: Run `find-fat-files.sh` (Python/Ruby/PHP) or `find-fat-components.mjs` (React) to surface fat-by-LoC + change-frequency candidates.
step.output: candidate file list with LoC + change_freq.
step.decision-gate: If no file > 100 lines — STOP, skip-already-small.

step.name: choose-pattern
step.action: Pick extraction pattern from the matrix: django/rails view → service-layer; react component → custom-hook + selector; laravel controller → query-object + DTO.
step.decision-gate: If pattern doesn't match framework — STOP, verdict block-pattern-not-applicable.

step.name: write-characterization
step.action: If branch coverage ≥ 70%, document the existing test set. Otherwise, write characterization tests per `characterization-test-recipes`.
step.decision-gate: If neither coverage nor plan — STOP, verdict block-no-coverage.

step.name: extract
step.action: Perform extraction. Run characterization suite; all snapshots must pass with zero diff.
step.decision-gate: If snapshots diff — STOP, revert, classify diff per characterization-test-recipes.

step.name: verify
step.action: Measure ai_context_savings_tokens: simulate a typical edit, count tokens of files an LLM loads. Confirm savings > 0.
step.decision-gate: If savings ≤ 0 — STOP, reconsider whether decomposition served the goal.
